sizing_rule.note: Fractional f approach: multiply optimal f by a fraction (example 0.5 for half f). Start with 0.5 fractional level to reduce variance while maintaining mathematical optimization.

source_rule_text: Use a fractional f position sizing approach where you set an initial fractional level (between 0 and 1) to determine the fraction of optimal f to employ, starting at half f (0.5) level if desired.
